channel.title: JLT Travel Collection
channel.description: Featured offers from JLT Group's travel partners

item.title: ✨ Property Spotlight: White Exclusive Suites & Villas, Lagoa, São Miguel 🌊
item.description:
✨ Property Spotlight: White Exclusive Suites & Villas, Lagoa, São Miguel 🌊
Ten cliff-top suites and a four-bedroom villa above the Atlantic, anchored by a heated saltwater infinity pool that stays open all year. White Exclusive Suites & Villas sits eight minutes from Ponta Delgada on São Miguel, close enough for dinners in town, far enough that the loudest sound is the sea.
Perfect if you've been searching for a proper Azores base with the quiet of the coast and the ease of a town nearby. 🌅
✨ What makes this special: → Heated saltwater infinity pool (4x10m), open year-round 🏊‍♀️ → Boutique 18th-century building on a cliff top with ocean views 🌊 → On-site restaurant Cardume, plus bar and lounge areas 🍽️ → In-house massages and yoga classes available (additional cost) 💆‍♀️ → Nine-metre chauffeured motor launch for coastal excursions ⚓ → Eight minutes from Ponta Delgada, 15-minute walk to Praia do Pópulo 📍
The ten suites suit couples looking for a slow-paced boutique stay, while the separate four-bedroom villa with private hot tub works for families or friend groups travelling together. Add restaurant dining on site and a chauffeured motor launch for coastal days, and you've got a base that works for slow mornings and full outings.
*Cliff-top boutique with a heated saltwater infinity pool, open every month of the year* 🌅
Ready to escape to your own private sanctuary? 🌅 Email: bookings@thejltgroup.co.uk 📩
**#TheAzores #SaoMiguel #BoutiqueHotel #LuxuryTravel #TheJLTCollection**

item.title: ✨ Cruise Spotlight: Greek Islands & Turkish Coastlines, Mediterranean 🌊
item.description:
✨ Cruise Spotlight: Greek Islands & Turkish Coastlines, Mediterranean 🌊
Eight days sailing from Athens through Delos, Mykonos, Patmos, Kusadasi, Kos, Santorini, and Paros on a small-ship yacht that keeps the passenger count low and the shore-excursion pace personal. Drinks, shore excursions, and gratuities are already settled before you board.
Ideal if you want a small-ship Aegean sailing with the logistics already sorted. 🌅
✨ What makes this special: → 8-day small-ship yacht cruise through the Greek Islands and Turkish coastline ⛵ → Ports of call include Athens, Delos, Mykonos, Patmos, Kusadasi, Kos, Santorini, and Paros 📍 → Shore excursions included via the EmeraldPLUS cultural and EmeraldACTIVE active-adventure programmes 🏛️ → 20 meals included plus a Welcome and Farewell Reception & Dinner 🍽️ → Complimentary wine, beer, soft drinks, and selected cocktails throughout the day 🍷 → All tipping, gratuities, port taxes, and charges included 💳
Built for couples and small groups who want the Aegean at a slower, more personal pace. From £4,593 per person on the Best Available Fare.
*A small-ship yacht that keeps the passenger count low and the shore-excursion pace personal* 🌊
Ready to sail the Aegean at small-ship pace? 🌊 Email: bookings@thejltgroup.co.uk 📩
**#EmeraldCruises #GreekIslands #SmallShipCruise #MediterraneanCruise #TheJLTCollection**

item.title: ✨ Escape Spotlight: Albania Discovered - Tirana & Beyond, Albania 🌍
item.description:
✨ Escape Spotlight: Albania Discovered - Tirana & Beyond, Albania 🌍
Turquoise water bubbling up from an unseen depth at the Blue Eye Spring, ancient stones at Butrint, and eight days escorted through Albania from the capital to the Riviera. Every leg accompanied by a Holiday Director and a specialist local guide, with flights and ATOL protection included.
Perfect if you've been searching for a proper cultural tour of the Balkans without wrestling the logistics yourself. 🌍
✨ What makes this special: → Eight-day fully escorted tour with flights and ATOL protection included ✈️ → Takes in Tirana, Berat, Gjirokaster and the Albanian Riviera 📍 → Visits UNESCO-listed Butrint, ancient Apollonia, Argjiro Castle and the Blue Eye Spring 🌍 → Seven nights across 4-star hotels with eleven meals included 🛏️ → Accompanied throughout by a Holiday Director and a specialist local guide 🧭 → Traditional folklore show and dinner included one evening 🍽️
Departures run from September 2026 through October 2027, with flights, overseas transfers and a welcome drink all included. Ideal for couples and small groups after a proper guided experience, with culture, history and practicalities all handled.
*Eight days from Tirana to the Riviera, UNESCO-listed Butrint included, from £1,339 per person* 🌍
Ready to discover Albania with expert guides? 🌍 Email: bookings@thejltgroup.co.uk 📩
**#Albania #EscortedTour #BalkansTravel #CulturalTravel #TheJLTCollection**

item.title: ✨ Property Spotlight: Villa Del Cielo, Lourdas, Kefalonia 🌅
item.description:
✨ Property Spotlight: Villa Del Cielo, Lourdas, Kefalonia 🌅
A hillside villa above Lourdas Bay with a private infinity pool, three ensuite bedrooms and sweeping views across the Ionian to Mount Aenos. Villa Del Cielo, meaning 'the villa of the sky', sits in one of Kefalonia's most peaceful corners, a short walk from village tavernas and a 15-minute stroll to the beach.
Perfect if you've been searching for an authentic Greek island escape away from the resort crowds. 🌊
✨ What makes this special:
→ Private 10.80m infinity pool with panoramic views over Lourdas Bay 🏊‍♀️
→ Three ensuite bedrooms sleeping six, each with terrace or balcony access 🛏️
→ Walking distance to Lourdas village restaurants, cafés and minimarkets 🍽️
→ Sweeping views of Mount Aenos and the Ionian Sea from every terrace 🌅
→ Covered alfresco dining area, BBQ and mature landscaped gardens 🌿
→ Part of the Solmar Luxe Collection with 49 premium amenities including air conditioning and high-spec kitchen 👑
Sleeps six across three ensuite bedrooms, available May through October with Saturday changeovers. Ideal for couples travelling together or small groups who want authentic Kefalonia rather than a busy tourist strip.
*Three ensuite bedrooms, one hillside setting above one of Kefalonia's most peaceful bays* 🌍
Ready to escape to your own private sanctuary? 🌊 Email: bookings@thejltgroup.co.uk 📩
#Kefalonia #GreekIslands #VillaRental #LuxuryTravel #TheJLTCollection

item.title: ✨ Escape Spotlight: Great Pyramids & Full-Board Nile Cruise, Egypt 🌍
item.description:
✨ Escape Spotlight: Great Pyramids & Full-Board Nile Cruise, Egypt 🌍
Eight days across Cairo, Giza, Aswan, Kom Ombo, Edfu and Luxor, with three nights full-board on the Nile between the ancient sites. A packed itinerary that pairs the Great Pyramids with the temples of Upper Egypt, all handled end-to-end with flights, transfers and a guide included.
Perfect if you've been waiting for the right way to see Egypt properly, without piecing it together yourself. 🌅
✨ What makes this special: → 8-day tour taking in Cairo, Giza, Aswan, Kom Ombo, Edfu and Luxor 📍 → 3-night full-board Nile River cruise with all meals on board 🚢 → International flights, internal flights and all transfers included ✈️ → English-speaking guide throughout with 10+ site visits and entrance fees covered 🎟️ → Great Pyramids & Sphinx, Valley of the Kings, Karnak Temple and Abu Simbel included 🌍 → 4-star hotel in Cairo for 4 nights plus ATOL protection 🛏️
Departures run through June and July 2026, suited to couples, friend groups and solo travellers drawn to culture and ancient history. Expect a full itinerary with some early morning starts, and the payoff of seeing the headline sites with a guide who can bring the context to life.
*8 days, 7 nights, one Nile cruise and every headline site of ancient Egypt* 🌅
Ready for the adventure of a lifetime? 🌍 Email: bookings@thejltgroup.co.uk 📩
**#Egypt #NileCruise #EgyptTour #LuxuryTravel #TheJLTCollection**

item.title: ✨ Escape Spotlight: Cruising in Assam, India 🌿
item.description:
✨ Escape Spotlight: Cruising in Assam, India 🌿
Fourteen days along the Brahmaputra, from the colonial streets of Calcutta to jeep safaris in Kaziranga and a stay in a traditional tea bungalow in Dibrugarh. This is northeast India at its most textured… wildlife, weaving, monasteries, and river life you won't find on the standard India circuit.
Perfect if you want depth over highlights, and time to actually settle into a place. 🐘
✨ What makes this special: → Relaxing river cruise along the Brahmaputra with stops at riverside villages and traditional silk weaving workshops 🛶 → Jeep safari in Kaziranga National Park, home to the rare one-horned rhinoceros, deer, otters and turtles 🦏 → Majuli Island, the world's largest river island, with colourful Vaishnava monasteries and craft workshops 🏝️ → Guided walking tour through colonial Calcutta, including Victoria Memorial and the Pareshnath Jain Temple 🕌 → Immersive stay in a traditional Assamese tea bungalow at Mancotta Chang, with a tour of Dibrugarh's tea estates 🍃 → Jeep visit to Pobitora Wildlife Sanctuary, home to rare golden langur monkeys and Indian one-horned rhinoceros 🐒
Fourteen days moving between river, jungle, monastery and tea garden, with expert local guiding throughout. Ideal if you've already done the Golden Triangle and want a slower, wilder side of India.
*Fourteen days from £5,795 per person, cruise + safari + colonial city + tea estate* 🌿 Ready to trade the tourist trail for the Brahmaputra? 🛶 Email: bookings@thejltgroup.co.uk 📩 #Assam #IndiaTravel #RiverCruise #WildlifeTravel #TheJLTCollection

item.title: ✨ Escape Spotlight: West Highland Way, Scotland 🏴󠁧󠁢󠁳󠁣󠁴󠁿
item.description:
✨ Escape Spotlight: West Highland Way, Scotland 🏴󠁧󠁢󠁳󠁣󠁴󠁿
Peat and heather underfoot across Rannoch Moor, the long climb over the Devil's Staircase at 548 metres, and Glen Nevis opening ahead as the trail nears Fort William. Nine days walking Scotland's most classic long-distance trail, inn to inn, with your bag moved ahead each morning.
Built for walkers who want the Highlands on foot, at their own pace, without the logistics. 🥾
✨ What makes this special: → 9-day, 8-night self-guided walking holiday from Milngavie to Fort William 🗺️ → 96 miles across the western Highlands, graded Moderate 🏔️ → Loch Lomond, Rannoch Moor and Glen Nevis along the route 🌲 → Views from Conic Hill and the Devil's Staircase, the trail's highest point at 548m 🥾 → Carefully selected B&Bs, small hotels and guesthouses each night, with breakfast included 🛏️ → Baggage transfer included, one 20kg bag per person moved ahead each day 🎒
Around 12 miles a day on average, walked independently between inns from March through October. Ideal for hiking couples, friend groups, and independent walkers who want a classic Highlands trail without a guided group pace.
*From the oak woods of Loch Lomond to the wide silence of Rannoch Moor* 🏔️
Ready to walk the West Highland Way at your own pace? 🥾 Email: bookings@thejltgroup.co.uk 📩
**#WestHighlandWay #Scotland #WalkingHoliday #SelfGuidedTravel #TheJLTCollection**

item.title: ✨ Escape Spotlight: A European Odyssey, Switzerland, Italy & Austria 🏔️
item.description:
✨ Escape Spotlight: A European Odyssey, Switzerland, Italy & Austria 🏔️
Gliding out across Lake Zurich on the opening morning, with Lucerne's old town waiting that afternoon and Rome, Florence and Venice still ahead. A European Odyssey with Red Tours runs twelve days and eighteen cities across Switzerland, Italy and Austria, guided end to end from Zurich to Vienna.
Perfect if you've been searching for a first proper trip to Europe that hits the landmarks without a spreadsheet of your own. 🗺️
✨ What makes this special: → Twelve-day guided tour across Switzerland, Italy and Austria taking in eighteen cities 🌍 → Opens in Zurich with a Lake Zurich cruise and time to explore Lucerne 🚤 → Italy leg covers Rome, Florence, Venice, Pisa and Milan 🇮🇹 → Closes in Austria through Innsbruck, Salzburg and Vienna 🎼 → Daily breakfast, hotel accommodation, professional English-speaking guide and modern transport throughout 🚌 → Guided visits to the Leaning Tower of Pisa, the Murano Glass Factory and a boat cruise on Lake Traunsee ⛵
Ideal for first-time Europe visitors, couples or small groups who want a multi-country trip handled from start to finish. Every hotel, transfer and landmark visit is arranged, so you arrive and enjoy.
*Twelve days, three countries, eighteen cities, one guide from Zurich to Vienna* 🏔️
Ready to see the best of Europe in one trip? 🗺️ Email: bookings@thejltgroup.co.uk 📩
**#EuropeTour #GuidedTravel #TravelInspiration #TheJLTCollection**

item.title: ✨ Escape Spotlight: Southwestern Trails, Texas, New Mexico & Arizona 🌵
item.description:
✨ Escape Spotlight: Southwestern Trails, Texas, New Mexico & Arizona 🌵
Twelve days across three states, ten nights in comfortable hotels, and ten included excursions covering the landmarks that shaped the American Southwest. Southwestern Trails moves you from Houston to Tucson with a professional tour manager handling every detail.
Perfect if you've been searching for the wide-open West without piecing the logistics together yourself. 🌅
✨ What makes this special: → White Sands National Park and its otherworldly gypsum dune landscape 🏜️ → NASA Johnson Space Center tour in Houston 🚀 → Fort Worth Stockyards cattle drive experience 🤠 → Taos Pueblo guided tour with a Native American specialist 🪶 → Old Tombstone and the OK Corral gunfight location in Arizona 🎯 → Alamo audio tour in San Antonio and Dealey Plaza in Dallas 🏛️
Twelve days, ten nights across three states, with international flights from London Heathrow on British Airways and door-to-door chauffeur service included. Ideal for culture and history travellers who want to see the Southwest alongside a tour manager on the ground.
*Ten included excursions, eleven meals, and a no-surcharge guarantee on fuel and exchange rates* 🎟️
Ready to explore the American Southwest with every detail handled? 🌅 Email: bookings@thejltgroup.co.uk 📩
**#AmericanSouthwest #EscortedTours #TexasNewMexicoArizona #TheJLTCollection**

item.title: ✨ Escape Spotlight: China Winter Wonderland, Shanghai to Harbin ❄️
item.description:
✨ Escape Spotlight: China Winter Wonderland, Shanghai to Harbin ❄️
Fifteen days across five cities, timed for the Harbin Ice & Snow Festival and a Great Wall champagne toast on New Year's Eve. Wendy Wu Tours pulls together the winter version of China you rarely see in the guidebooks.
Perfect if you want a Christmas and New Year trip built around culture, food, and genuine spectacle. 🏮
✨ What makes this special: → Harbin Ice & Snow Festival with illuminated sculptures and snow art at one of the world's largest ice events ❄️ → Christmas markets and a Huangpu River cruise through Shanghai's skyline 🎄 → Giant pandas at the Chengdu Panda Conservation Centre 🐼 → New Year's Eve at Gubei Watertown with a Great Wall champagne toast at Jinshanling 🥂 → Terracotta Warriors in Xi'an paired with a hands-on ceramic workshop visit 🏺 → A culinary thread running through the trip: Shui Jiao dumplings, Sichuan hot pot, and a Peking duck farewell dinner 🥟
Fifteen days, five cities, four scenic bullet-train journeys, and a Tang Dynasty cultural performance woven through the itinerary. Ideal for cultural travellers, families with children aged 12 and up, and group travellers who want winter China at its most atmospheric.
*Five cities, fifteen days, and a Great Wall New Year's Eve toast at Jinshanling* 🏯
Ready to spend the festive season somewhere completely different? 🏮 Email: bookings@thejltgroup.co.uk 📩
**#ChinaTravel #WendyWuTours #WinterEscape #HarbinIceFestival #TheJLTCollection**

item.title: ✨ Escape Spotlight: The Ultimate Cultural Morocco Tour, Morocco 🌍
item.description:
✨ Escape Spotlight: The Ultimate Cultural Morocco Tour, Morocco 🌍
Thirteen days from Tangier to Casablanca, taking in the blue streets of Chefchaouen, the ancient medinas of Fes, a night under the stars in the Sahara, and the Atlantic breeze of Essaouira. This is Morocco at full depth, not a highlights reel.
Perfect if you've been searching for a genuine cultural journey that still feels like a holiday. 🌅
✨ What makes this special: → 13-day itinerary from Tangier to Casablanca covering Morocco's most iconic destinations 🌍 → Sahara Desert experience at Merzouga with camelback riding and overnight camping under the stars 🏖️ → Ancient medinas, tanneries and the blue-washed streets of Chefchaouen and Fes 📍 → Valley of Roses, Dades Gorges and the historic Kasbah of Ait Benhaddou 🌿 → A full day in Marrakech exploring the medina's labyrinthine alleys and authentic street food 🍽️ → Atlantic coast escape to Essaouira's harbour, artisanal markets and fresh seafood 🌊
Small-group departures run year-round with a lead-in price based on four sharing. Ideal for couples, close friends and culture seekers looking for a genuine winter sun escape from the UK.
*13 days, from Tangier to Casablanca, with a night in the Sahara at Merzouga* ✨
Ready to see Morocco as it really is? 🌍 Email: bookings@thejltgroup.co.uk 📩
**#Morocco #CulturalTravel #SaharaDesert #WinterSun #TheJLTCollection**

item.title: ✨ Escape Spotlight: Centennial Historic Route 66, Chicago to Los Angeles 🌍
item.description:
✨ Escape Spotlight: Centennial Historic Route 66, Chicago to Los Angeles 🌍
Fifteen days on the Mother Road, tracing the original Route 66 from the Chicago skyline all the way to the Los Angeles coast. A guided escorted tour through eight states, with the neon-lit diners, red rock deserts and small-town Americana that gave this road its legend.
Perfect if you've been waiting for the right reason to tick off the ultimate American road trip. 🌅
✨ What makes this special:
→ Fifteen-day guided escorted tour through eight states, Chicago to Los Angeles 🌍
→ Chicago city tour taking in the Cloud Gate sculpture, the Magnificent Mile and the iconic skyline 📍
→ Cadillac Ranch in Amarillo, where ten painted Cadillacs sit buried grill-first in the ground 🎨
→ Grand Canyon National Park with an included train ride through the canyon itself 🚂
→ The neon nostalgia of Seligman, Gallup and the restored 1929 Phillips 66 gas station in McLean ✨
→ Two nights in Las Vegas and two nights in Los Angeles built into the itinerary 🌆
Based on 2 adults sharing, with departures running May to September 2026. Ideal for couples, groups, history buffs and anyone planning their first great American road trip.
*Fifteen days, fourteen nights and eight states along the original Mother Road* 🛣️
Ready for the adventure of a lifetime? 🌍 Email: bookings@thejltgroup.co.uk 📩
**#Route66 #AmericanRoadTrip #EscortedTours #TheJLTCollection**

item.title: ✨ Experience Spotlight: Private Chaouen Full Day City Tour, Chefchaouen, Morocco 🌍
item.description:
✨ Experience Spotlight: Private Chaouen Full Day City Tour, Chefchaouen, Morocco 🌍
If your cruise is calling at Tangier, this full-day private excursion takes you high into the Rif mountains to Chefchaouen, Morocco's famous Blue City. You'll swap the port for eight hours of blue-washed alleyways, a 15th-century Kasbah and a private guide who's yours alone for the day.
Ideal if you've been searching for a shore day that actually shows you Morocco beyond the harbour. 🌅
✨ What makes this special:
→ Full-day private excursion from Tangier up into the Rif mountains to Chefchaouen 🌍
→ Wander the Medina's labyrinthine blue-washed alleyways and artisan quarter 📍
→ Visit the 15th-century Kasbah at the heart of the old town 🏰
→ Explore local souks for spices, Moroccan textiles and handmade crafts 🛍️
→ Private English-speaking guide throughout, with your own group only 👑
→ Air-conditioned transport with port pickup and drop-off from Tangier 🚐
Private group of 1 to 7 passengers, so you travel with only the people you arrived with. Ideal for couples on a shore day, small families or a group of friends who want the Blue City at their own pace.
*Approximately 8 hours from port to port, private group of 1 to 7* 🗓️
Ready to see Morocco beyond the port? 🌍 Email: bookings@thejltgroup.co.uk 📩
**#Chefchaouen #Morocco #CruiseExcursion #BlueCity #TheJLTCollection**

item.title: ✨ Property Spotlight: Villa Alkhozama, Palmeraie, Marrakech 🌴
item.description:
✨ Property Spotlight: Villa Alkhozama, Palmeraie, Marrakech 🌴
A private two-bedroom villa in the Palmeraie palm grove, twelve kilometres from Marrakech airport, with a heated pool, a full-time resident chef, and unlimited spa treatments folded into the rate. Villa Alkhozama is built for couples or small groups who want the calm of a private retreat without lifting a finger to organise it.
Everything you'd normally book, tip, and arrange on the ground is already handled. 🕊️
✨ What makes this special: → Private 12m heated pool set in gardens in the Palmeraie 🏊 → Hammam steam room plus unlimited spa treatments throughout your stay 💆 → Full board with a resident chef and all non-alcoholic beverages included 🍽️ → Guided tour of the Marrakech medina and souk included 🧭 → Custom furnishings blending traditional Moroccan craftsmanship with contemporary design 🕌 → Resident villa manager, full-time housekeeping, and one return airport transfer included 🛎️
Sleeps four across two bedrooms and two bathrooms, twelve kilometres from Marrakech airport with air conditioning and underfloor heating throughout for year-round comfort. Ideal for two couples travelling together or a small family looking for a fully serviced escape in Morocco.
*From £14,700 per villa, 3-night minimum* 🌙
Ready to slow down inside the palm groves of Marrakech? 🌴 Email: bookings@thejltgroup.co.uk 📩
#Marrakech #Morocco #VillaRental #LuxuryTravel #TheJLTCollection

item.title: ✨ Escape Spotlight: Japan Cherry Blossom Small Group Adventure, Tokyo to Osaka 🌍
item.description:
✨ Escape Spotlight: Japan Cherry Blossom Small Group Adventure, Tokyo to Osaka 🌍
Eight days across Tokyo, Kyoto, Nara and Osaka timed to peak sakura, with cherry blossom viewing at Shinjuku Gyoen, a Sumida River cruise past flower-lined banks, and Mount Fuji from Chureito Pagoda. A small group of no more than eight travellers, led by an English-speaking guide from arrival to departure.
Perfect if you've been waiting for the right spring to finally see Japan in bloom. 🌸
✨ What makes this special: → Cherry blossom viewing at Shinjuku Gyoen and Kyoto's Kiyomizu-dera Temple in peak season 🌸 → Mount Fuji day trip with views from Chureito Pagoda and a Lake Kawaguchi cruise 🌅 → Small group of 2 to 8 travellers with an English-speaking guide throughout 🌍 → High-speed Shinkansen from Tokyo to Kyoto, then on to Nara and Osaka 🚄 → Nara Park's free-roaming deer and Todai-ji Temple's giant bronze Buddha 🦌 → Fushimi Inari Taisha's torii gate paths and the Arashiyama bamboo groves in Kyoto 🌿
Eight days from Tokyo to Osaka during cherry blossom season, in a group capped at eight travellers. Ideal for couples, small groups, and anyone drawn to Japan's culture, temples and spring landscapes.
*Eight days across four cities, one guide, and no more than eight travellers* 🌸
Ready for the adventure of a lifetime? 🌍 Email: bookings@thejltgroup.co.uk 📩
#Japan #CherryBlossom #SmallGroupTravel #CulturalTours #TheJLTCollection

item.title: ✨ Property Spotlight: GoldenEye, Oracabessa Bay, Jamaica 🌴
item.description:
✨ Property Spotlight: GoldenEye, Oracabessa Bay, Jamaica 🌴
Fifty-two acres of Ian Fleming's original estate on Jamaica's north coast, where James Bond was born on the page. GoldenEye is where literary history meets barefoot Caribbean luxury, wrapped around two private beaches and a natural lagoon.
Ideal if you want the story of a place to matter as much as the setting itself. 📖
✨ What makes this special: → Ian Fleming's original estate across 52 acres of tropical grounds on Jamaica's north coast 🌴 → Two secluded beaches plus a natural lagoon with kayaking, paddleboarding and snorkelling included 🏖️ → Three swimming pools including a saltwater pool 🏊‍♀️ → FieldSpa lagoon-side wellness facility with treatments using locally grown herbs 💆‍♀️ → Multiple dining venues including the tree house Gazebo restaurant and beachfront Bizot Bar 🍽️ → 48 villas, cottages and beach huts including the iconic 3-bedroom GoldenEye Villa, Fleming's original home 🏡
A choice of 48 villas, cottages and beach huts across the estate, ideal for couples, spa lovers and travellers who want a hideaway with real depth of story. Tennis, glass-bottom boat trips, yoga and fishing all sit within the grounds.
*From £3,775 per person for 7 nights including breakfast, return flights, private transfers and UK airport lounge access* ✈️
Ready to escape into the pages of a legend? 🌴 Email: bookings@thejltgroup.co.uk 📩
#Jamaica #GoldenEye #LuxuryTravel #CaribbeanEscape #TheJLTCollection

item.title: ✨ Property Spotlight: Royal Palm Beachcomber Luxury, Grand Baie 🌴
item.description:
✨ Property Spotlight: Royal Palm Beachcomber Luxury, Grand Baie 🌴
Sixty-nine suites on an idyllic beachfront, a short walk from the buzz of Grand Baie, with a staff-to-guest ratio of three to one. Royal Palm was the first hotel in the Indian Ocean to join The Leading Hotels of the World, and it still sets the standard today.
Perfect if you want a beachfront setting with the option to wander into one of Mauritius' liveliest towns whenever the mood strikes. 🌅
✨ What makes this special: → 69 intimate suites on an idyllic stretch of beach, minutes from Grand Baie 🏖️ → Three staff to every guest, so service feels personal rather than performed 💆‍♀️ → Spa Beachcomber with Valmont products and three tempered swimming pools 🧖‍♀️ → Four restaurants led by internationally recognised chefs 👨‍🍳 → Complimentary land and water sports, nightly live music, and access to Mont Choisy Le Golf ⛳ → Complimentary Kids Club, on-site helipad, and WiFi throughout 🛬
Available on bed and breakfast or half board, with 69 suites in total. Ideal for luxury couples, honeymooners, and families who want polish without formality.
*Sixty-nine suites, three staff to every guest, and one of the Indian Ocean's founding Leading Hotels* 🌴
Ready to slip into island life the elegant way? 🌅 Email: bookings@thejltgroup.co.uk 📩
#Mauritius #GrandBaie #LuxuryTravel #IndianOcean #TheJLTCollection

item.title: ✨ Cruise Spotlight: Magical Midnight Sun, Iceland & Faroe Islands 🌊
item.description:
✨ Cruise Spotlight: Magical Midnight Sun, Iceland & Faroe Islands 🌊
Ten nights round trip from Reykjavik aboard Regent's Seven Seas Grandeur, sailing under the midnight sun to Djupivogur, Seydisfjordur, the Faroes, Akureyri, Isafjordur, and Grundarfjordur. Up to 36 shore excursions are included at no extra cost, so Iceland's volcanoes, glaciers, and waterfalls open up without a single additional charge.
Fares, excursions, fine dining, drinks, spa, Wi-Fi, and gratuities all folded into the price… almost nothing left to pay onboard. 🌅
✨ What makes this special: → Ten-night voyage round trip from Reykjavik aboard Seven Seas Grandeur 🚢 → Up to 36 shore excursions included at no extra cost across Iceland and the Faroes 🌋 → Unlimited fine wines, craft cocktails, champagne, and speciality coffees included throughout 🥂 → All speciality restaurants included, plus 24-hour in-suite dining and welcome champagne on arrival 🍽️ → Unlimited spa facilities, unlimited Wi-Fi, pre-paid gratuities, and valet laundry included 💆‍♀️ → Private balcony suite with European Queen Elite Slumber bed, marble bathroom, and floor-to-ceiling ocean views 🛏️
Sailing 12–22 July 2026 under near-continuous daylight, calling at seven ports across two of the North Atlantic's most dramatic island nations. Ideal for travellers who want the scenery of Iceland paired with the ease of a truly all-inclusive fare.
*Ten nights, seven ports, and up to 36 included shore excursions from £13,369 per person* 🌅
Ready to sail under the midnight sun in true all-inclusive style? 🚢 Email: bookings@thejltgroup.co.uk 📩
#Iceland #FaroeIslands #LuxuryCruise #RegentSevenSeas #TheJLTCollection

item.title: ✨ Property Spotlight: Domes Lake Algarve, Vilamoura 🌊
item.description:
✨ Property Spotlight: Domes Lake Algarve, Vilamoura 🌊
Palatial suites and villas set around a private seawater lake, with direct access to Praia de Falésia and the Vilamoura marina a short walk away. A Marriott Autograph Collection property with four gourmet restaurants, a lakeside spa, and golf concierge access to five championship courses minutes from the door.
The Algarve, reinvented for stays that want space, sun, and serious food in equal measure. 🌅
✨ What makes this special: → Palatial suites and villas surrounding a private seawater lake with direct access to Praia de Falésia 🏖️ → Four gourmet restaurants including Àcosta by Chef Olivier beachside and Sora Canteen adults-only sushi bar 🍽️ → Soma Spa "The Refined" with lakeside treatments, yoga, and fitness facilities 💆‍♀️ → Golf concierge with access to five championship courses minutes from the resort ⛳ → 1.2km wooden deck pathway through Vilamoura Nature Park with 5km trail, cycling, and horseback riding 🌳 → Views over Vilamoura marina, awarded Best International Marina 2021 ⚓
Elite Private Residences with full kitchens make this a natural fit for longer stays and multi-generational travel. The KiEPOS educational garden and complimentary kids club keep younger guests happily occupied while the adults settle into the sushi bar.
Ready to reinvent your Algarve escape? 🌅 Email: bookings@thejltgroup.co.uk 📩
#Algarve #Vilamoura #LuxuryTravel #Portugal #TheJLTCollection

item.title: ✨ Escape Spotlight: A&K Sanctuary Tanzania Safari, Tanzania 🌍
item.description:
✨ Escape Spotlight: A&K Sanctuary Tanzania Safari, Tanzania 🌍
Nine days across Tarangire, Ngorongoro, and the Serengeti, staying exclusively in A&K's own Sanctuary camps. Built for travellers who want the Great Migration and the Big Five without piecing the logistics together themselves.
Front-row access to over one million wildebeest and zebra on the move. ✨
✨ What makes this special: → Expert-guided game drives through Tarangire National Park, home to herds of 300+ elephants along the Tarangire River 🐘 → Full-day excursion into Ngorongoro Crater, a UNESCO World Heritage Site with Big Five sightings on the crater floor 🦁 → Three nights at Kichakani Camp in the Serengeti with front-row access to the Great Migration ✨ → Authentic Maasai cultural visit to a traditional boma with a local guide 🧭 → Exclusive stays at three A&K Sanctuary lodges: Swala Camp, Ngorongoro Crater Camp, and Kichakani Camp 🏕️ → Fully inclusive: meals, internal flights, transfers, entrance fees, and 24/7 A&K expert support ✈️
23 departure dates available across 2026 and 2027, so you can time the trip to the migration window that suits you. From £5,663 per person.
*Three national parks, three A&K Sanctuary camps, and the Great Migration on your doorstep* 🌍
Ready to see Tanzania at eye level? 🌍 Email: bookings@thejltgroup.co.uk 📩
#Tanzania #Safari #GreatMigration #LuxuryTravel #TheJLTCollection

item.title: ✨ Cruise Spotlight: A Journey to Stunning Fjords, Colourful Coastlines & Nordic Delights, Norwegian Fjords to Copenhagen 🌊
item.description:
✨ Cruise Spotlight: A Journey to Stunning Fjords, Colourful Coastlines & Nordic Delights, Norwegian Fjords to Copenhagen 🌊
Eight nights aboard EXPLORA III sailing from Southampton through Mandal, Sandnes, Olden, Bergen, and Flåm before arriving in Copenhagen. A fully all-inclusive voyage built around the Norwegian fjords at their most dramatic.
Ideal if you've been waiting for a Nordic sailing that lets you settle in without a wallet reappearing at every turn. 🏔️
✨ What makes this special: → Eight-night voyage aboard EXPLORA III, Southampton to Copenhagen via five Norwegian ports 🚢 → Nine culinary venues with in-suite dining and unlimited beverages included throughout 🍷 → Sailing through Olden and Flåm, two of Norway's most dramatic glacial landscapes 🏔️ → Ocean Wellness spa thermal area, fitness, and mindfulness activities included in the voyage 💆 → Complimentary high-speed Wi-Fi, all gratuities, and shuttle services to city centres at every port 📶 → Five heated pools, 12 bars and lounges, and world-class entertainment onboard 🌟
Sailing 17–25 August 2026, the itinerary threads Mandal's colourful coastline, Sandnes as the gateway to Stavanger, and the deep glacial theatre of Olden and Flåm. Bergen and Copenhagen bookend the journey with two of Northern Europe's most walkable harbour cities.
*Eight nights, five Norwegian ports, and a fully all-inclusive fare covering food, drinks, Wi-Fi, gratuities, and shuttles* 🌅
Ready to sail the fjords without a bill at every turn? 🌊 Email: bookings@thejltgroup.co.uk 📩
#ExploraJourneys #NorwegianFjords #LuxuryCruise #NordicTravel #TheJLTCollection

item.title: ✨ Cruise Spotlight: Best of the Danube, Central Europe 🌍
item.description:
✨ Cruise Spotlight: Best of the Danube, Central Europe 🌍
Seven nights roundtrip from Budapest through Austria, Slovakia and Hungary, sailing past vineyard-clad hills to Melk Abbey and mooring for two full days in Vienna. AmaWaterways runs this itinerary on small ships built for the river, not scaled-down ocean liners.
A river cruise that trades sea-day filler for real time in the cities you actually came to see. 🎼
✨ What makes this special: → 7-night roundtrip Budapest itinerary through Austria, Slovakia and Hungary 🚢 → Sail the Wachau Valley past vineyard-clad hills to Baroque Melk Abbey 🍇 → Two days in Vienna covering Schönbrunn Palace, the Vienna Woods and living music heritage 🎼 → A day in Bratislava exploring royal legacies, riverside promenades and Old Town flavours 🏰 → Optional excursion from Linz to Salzburg's gardens or fairy-tale Cesky Krumlov 🌷 → Choice of ships including AmaReina, AmaSonata (162 passengers) or the spacious AmaMagna (196 passengers) 🛳️
Departures run July through September 2026 and February through September 2027. Ideal for couples, history lovers and culture travellers who want the great capitals of Central Europe without the coach-tour rush between them.
*Seven nights, three countries, and return flights from London or Manchester included* ✈️
Ready to sail the heart of Europe from Budapest to the Wachau? 🎼 Email: bookings@thejltgroup.co.uk 📩
**#DanubeCruise #RiverCruise #AmaWaterways #LuxuryTravel #TheJLTCollection**

item.title: ✨ Escape Spotlight: South Africa & Dubai Getaway For Two, Cape Town and Dubai ✈️
item.description:
✨ Escape Spotlight: South Africa & Dubai Getaway For Two, Cape Town and Dubai ✈️
Fifteen nights across four South African regions and Dubai - Big Five safari, whale coast, Cape Town waterfront, and a Dubai wind-down to finish.
→ Big Five private safari at Pumba Private Game Reserve with guided game drives at dawn and dusk 🦁 → Opening nights on Cape Town's waterfront at the Radisson Collection Hotel 🌊 → Whale coast at Hermanus and Garden Route stops through Plettenberg Bay 🐋 → Final stay at Taj Exotica Resort & Spa, Dubai, a warm-weather wind-down to close the trip 💆‍♀️ → Return Emirates flights from Heathrow with 23kg baggage per person included 🛫 → All internal flights, transfers, airport taxes and AMREF Flying Doctors cover included 🩺
*Fifteen nights, four South African regions, one Dubai finish, from £4,599 per person* 🌍
To book or find out more, email bookings@thejltgroup.co.uk 📩
#SouthAfrica #Dubai #LuxurySafari #CouplesTravel #TheJLTCollection

item.title: ✨ Escape Spotlight: Arctic Circle Explorer, Northern Norway and Sweden 🌌
item.description:
✨ Escape Spotlight: Arctic Circle Explorer, Northern Norway and Sweden 🌌
You wake under reindeer skins in a silent room carved from ice, your breath clouding above you and the Arctic sun still hours away. Five days above the Arctic Circle, from Tromsø to Kiruna, with a night inside the world-famous ICEHOTEL.
→ One night at the world-famous ICEHOTEL in Kiruna, sleeping on reindeer skins inside your ice room 🛏️ → Arctic Circle Train from Narvik to Kiruna, crossing into Sweden through Abisko National Park 🚆 → Northern Lights hunting from within the aurora zone, mid-November to mid-April 🌌 → Scenic bus journey through glacial valleys from Tromsø to Narvik 🏔️ → Optional husky mushing, snowmobile safaris, and reindeer safaris available in-resort 🐺 → Cable car up to Narvikfjellet for panoramic Arctic views over the fjords 🚡
*Two countries, one of the world's most northerly train journeys, and a night sleeping inside a hotel made of ice* 🌨️
To book or find out more, email bookings@thejltgroup.co.uk 📩
#ArcticCircle #ICEHOTEL #NorthernLights #NordicTravel #TheJLTCollection

item.title: ✨ Escape Spotlight: Highlights of Vietnam, Celebrating 30 Years 🌏
item.description:
✨ Escape Spotlight: Highlights of Vietnam, Celebrating 30 Years 🌏
Nineteen days from Hanoi's back-street food stalls to the quiet beaches of Phu Quoc, threaded with private guides, an overnight cruise through Bai Tu Long Bay, and sunrise access to the citadel at Hue. Built to mark Audley Travel's 30th anniversary, this is Vietnam at an unhurried pace.
For travellers who want the full sweep of the country without the coach-tour compromise. 🧭
✨ What makes this special: → Hanoi with a private guide, then a small-group street food tour led by a local food blogger 🍜 → Overnight cruise through Bai Tu Long Bay, the quieter, more immersive alternative to Halong 🛶 → Sunrise access to Hue's ancient citadel, followed by a countryside cycle past rice paddies and garden homes 🚴 → The Hai Van Pass south to UNESCO-listed Hoi An, with private-guide time in its car-free ancient streets 🏮 → Sunset cruise along the Mekong Delta aboard the Legacy Mekong 🌅 → Days of unwinding on Phu Quoc island to close the journey 🏝
Nineteen days, six regions, and every logistical piece handled: international and domestic flights, private guides throughout, all accommodation, and 24-hour support on the ground. Ideal for travellers who want depth over dashing between highlights.
Nineteen days across Hanoi, Bai Tu Long Bay, Hue, Hoi An, the Mekong Delta and Phu Quoc, from £7,430pp 🗺
Ready to see Vietnam at a pace that actually lets you feel it? 🌏 Email: bookings@thejltgroup.co.uk 📩
#Vietnam #LuxuryTravel #TailorMadeTravel #AsiaEscapes #TheJLTCollection

item.title: ✨ Escape Spotlight: Treasures of Sicily Small Group Escorted Tour, Sicily 🌋
item.description:
✨ Escape Spotlight: Treasures of Sicily Small Group Escorted Tour, Sicily 🌋
Eight days across Sicily with a maximum group of eighteen, taking in ancient Greek temples, Mount Etna, Taormina's Baroque streets, and Palermo's Arabic-influenced markets. Exclusive to Citalia, with English-speaking guides throughout and 4-star accommodation.
Ideal if you want the depth of an expert-guided tour without the coach-party feel of a bigger group. 🏛️
✨ What makes this special: → Ancient Greek temples, ruins, and theatre dating back thousands of years, exclusive to Citalia 🏛️ → Mount Etna, Europe's largest active volcano, with smoke rising from the crater 🌋 → Taormina's cobbled streets and Baroque architecture overlooking the Mediterranean 🏘️ → Palermo's Capo Market with a local guide and street food shaped by Arabic, Mediterranean, and Italian influences 🍢 → A traditional Sicilian winery for Etna wines and appetisers 🍷 → UNESCO-listed Cefalù Cathedral and its Arabian bathhouse from Norman times 🕌
Small group of six to eighteen guests, with departures on 09 September and 23 September 2026. The itinerary covers Catania, Piazza Armerina's Roman Villa, Cefalù, Palermo, Taormina, and Mount Etna.
Eight days, six historic locations, maximum eighteen guests 🗺️
Ready to walk Sicily's ancient streets with an expert local guide? 🌋 Email: bookings@thejltgroup.co.uk 📩
#Sicily #EscortedTour #ItalyTravel #Citalia #TheJLTCollection

item.title: ✨ Escape Spotlight: Flavours of Tuscany, Rome & Amalfi, Italy 🇮🇹
item.description:
✨ Escape Spotlight: Flavours of Tuscany, Rome & Amalfi, Italy 🇮🇹
→ Begin your Italian adventure with a guided tour of Florence, exploring centuries of Renaissance art and culture → Journey into the Chianti wine region for a traditional pasta-making class and vineyard visit → Discover the medieval gems of Lucca, the Leaning Tower of Pisa, and the hilltop city of Siena on a scenic full-day excursion → Spend two days in Rome with a guided city tour and free time to explore the vibrant Campo de' Fiori market → Uncover the ancient wonders of Pompeii before soaking up the breathtaking beauty of the Amalfi Coast → 10 nights in superior-rated hotels with daily breakfast and three evening meals included throughout
From £1,599 per person | bookings@thejltgroup.co.uk 📩
**#Italy** **#Tuscany** **#AmalfiCoast** **#EscortedTours** **#TheJLTCollection**

item.title: ✨ Escape Spotlight: Fascinating Southeast Asia, Cambodia to Myanmar 🌏
item.description:
✨ Escape Spotlight: Fascinating Southeast Asia, Cambodia to Myanmar 🌏
Twenty-nine days across five countries, from the temples of Angkor to the pagoda plains of Bagan, with domestic flights and private transport woven in throughout. Fascinating Southeast Asia is built for travellers who want the region properly, not in fragments.
A comprehensive route through the cultural heart of Southeast Asia, at a pace that lets each country register. 🧭
✨ What makes this special: → Temples of Angkor in Siem Reap, the vast UNESCO Khmer temple complex 🏛️ → Cu Chi Tunnels and Mekong Delta floating villages in Vietnam 🛶 → Overnight cruise on Halong Bay, sleeping among the limestone karsts 🌊 → Luang Prabang's saffron-robed monks, gilded temples, and Mekong sunsets 🌅 → Ethical elephant sanctuary encounter in the northern Thai highlands 🐘 → Thousands of ancient pagodas sweeping across the plains of Bagan at sunrise 🌄
Small groups of 2–13+ travellers, with English or French-speaking guides, domestic flights, private air-conditioned transport, and all entrance fees included from Bangkok to Bangkok. Suited to culture and heritage travellers who want the full arc of the region in one considered journey.
*Twenty-nine days, five countries, one continuous route from Angkor to Bagan* 🗺️
Ready to travel Southeast Asia the way it deserves? 🌏 Email: bookings@thejltgroup.co.uk 📩
**#SoutheastAsia #CulturalTravel #Angkor #Bagan #TheJLTCollection**

item.title: ✨ Escape Spotlight: Japan Unveiled, Tokyo to Osaka 🗾
item.description:
✨ Escape Spotlight: Japan Unveiled, Tokyo to Osaka 🗾
Sixteen days across eight destinations, from Tokyo's neon streets to Miyajima's floating torii gate, with a tour manager handling every logistic along the way. Newmarket Holidays' fully-escorted programme covers the headline sights and the quieter historic towns most first-timers miss.
Ideal if you want to see the real depth of Japan without piecing together bullet trains, hotels and translations yourself. 🍵
✨ What makes this special: → Traditional tea ceremony participation in Tokyo and a wagashi sweet-making lesson 🍵 → Mount Fuji viewing from Lake Kawaguchi and the Hakone Ropeway 🗻 → Matsumoto Castle, Japan's oldest surviving wooden castle 🏯 → Arashiyama Bamboo Grove walk in Kyoto and Nara's 1,200 protected deer 🦌 → Miyajima Island's 12th-century floating torii gate and Hiroshima Peace Memorial 🕊️ → Return UK flights, 13 nights' accommodation, 11 guided excursions and a dedicated tour manager throughout ✈️
Sixteen days covering Tokyo, Mount Fuji, Matsumoto, Kanazawa, Kyoto, Nara, Hiroshima and Osaka, with departures from September 2026 through November 2028. Built for couples and solo travellers who want a comprehensive first trip to Japan with the logistics handled.
*11 guided excursions, 13 nights, two bullet train journeys, and one dedicated tour manager from arrival to departure* 🚄
Ready to see Japan properly? 🗾 Email: bookings@thejltgroup.co.uk 📩
**#Japan #EscortedTour #CulturalTravel #NewmarketHolidays #TheJLTCollection**

item.title: ✨ Escape Spotlight: Classic Botswana & Victoria Falls 🐘
item.description:
✨ Escape Spotlight: Classic Botswana & Victoria Falls 🐘
Nine days across three of southern Africa's most extraordinary wildlife destinations, starting with two nights overlooking Victoria Falls and ending deep in the Okavango Delta. Big Five sightings, mokoro canoe excursions, and the highest density of African elephants on the planet, all stitched together with included internal charter flights.
Built for travellers who want genuine wilderness without the logistics headache. 🌅
✨ What makes this special: → Two nights at Ilala Lodge Hotel overlooking the largest sheet of falling water on earth, seen from the Zimbabwean side 💦 → Three fully inclusive nights at Chobe Elephant Camp on a river home to the planet's highest elephant density 🐘 → Three fully inclusive nights at Rra Dinare Camp in the Okavango Delta's NG32 private concession 🛶 → Big Five plus cheetah, wild dog, sable, roan antelope, hippo and crocodile across all three locations 🦁 → Mokoro traditional canoe excursions, bush walks, day and night game drives included 🌿 → Internal charter flights from Kasane to Santawani Airstrip and Santawani to Maun Airport included ✈️
Nine days, eight nights, three destinations, available year round. Ideal for travellers who want the full Botswana arc: thundering falls, elephant country, and the quiet water of the Delta.
Ready to explore Botswana from Victoria Falls to the Okavango? Email bookings@thejltgroup.co.uk 📩
#Botswana #VictoriaFalls #SafariTravel #OkavangoDelta #TheJLTCollection

item.title: ✨ Escape Spotlight: Icons of Japan, Osaka to Tokyo 🗾
item.description:
✨ Escape Spotlight: Icons of Japan, Osaka to Tokyo 🗾
Seven nights across Osaka, Kyoto, Mount Fuji, Kamakura and Tokyo, with a bullet train ride at 200mph stitching the route together. Icons of Japan is built for first-time visitors who want the headline moments handled by an expert without losing the thrill of discovery.
Perfect if you've always wanted to see Japan properly but didn't know where to start. 🌸
✨ What makes this special: → 7 nights in 4-star accommodation with breakfast included each morning 🛏️ → Bullet train journey between cities at 200mph 🚄 → Expert Tour Manager with you throughout the trip 🧭 → Guided Kyoto day taking in Kinkakuji golden temple, Nijo Castle and Ryōan-ji rock garden ⛩️ → Evening walk through the Gion district with potential Geisha sightings 🌙 → Mount Fuji views from Lake Yamanaka and Lake Kawaguchi 🗻
Small group departures capped at 36 guests, with return flights and transfers built in. Ideal for first-time visitors to Japan who want depth and pace handled for them.
Five iconic stops, one tour, capped at 36 guests 🗾
Ready to finally tick Japan off the list? 🌸 Email: bookings@thejltgroup.co.uk 📩
#Japan #EscortedTours #BulletTrain #FirstTimeJapan #TheJLTCollection

item.title: ✨ Escape Spotlight: Corfu to Athens - Meteora and Emerald Island 🌍
item.description:
✨ Escape Spotlight: Corfu to Athens - Meteora and Emerald Island 🌍
The Ionian going cobalt at Agios Gordios, bare feet on warm Meteora sandstone, then Plaka's evening tavernas spilling into the Athens night. Six days from Corfu's UNESCO Old Town to the Acropolis, built for travellers in their twenties and thirties who want a small group and proper time on the ground.
Perfect if you've been waiting for the right way to see more of Greece than one island. 🌅
✨ What makes this special: → Six-day journey from Corfu through Meteora to Athens 🌍 → Walking tour of Corfu Old Town, a UNESCO World Heritage Site 📍 → Sunset hike at Agios Gordios with optional cliff jumping into the Ionian 🌅 → Guided hike to the mountaintop monasteries of Meteora 🏔️ → Orientation walk through Athens' historic Plaka neighbourhood 🏛️ → Community visit to Shedia Home, a G Adventures-supported social enterprise 🌿
Small-group travel capped at 16 guests (averaging 12), with five breakfasts and a mix of hostel and hotel stays across six days. Designed for solo travellers and friend pairs aged 18 to 39 who want to cover ground without losing the detail.
Six days, three landmark stops, group size capped at sixteen 🏔️
Ready to see Greece from the inside? 🌅 Email: bookings@thejltgroup.co.uk 📩
#Greece #Meteora #Corfu #AdventureTravel #TheJLTCollection

item.title: ✨ Property Spotlight: Atrium Platinum Luxury Resort Hotel & Spa, Ixia, Rhodes 🌊
item.description:
✨ Property Spotlight: Atrium Platinum Luxury Resort Hotel & Spa, Ixia, Rhodes 🌊
Beachfront on Rhodes' west coast, four kilometres from Rhodes Town, with sea views running to the horizon. Atrium Platinum pairs a full-scale island resort with the largest hotel spa on Rhodes.
Perfect if you want a proper 5-star base with everything on-site, without giving up genuine Greek coastline. 🌅
✨ What makes this special: → Beachfront setting on Rhodes' west coast, four kilometres from historic Rhodes Town 🏖️ → Aphrodite & Hermes Thalasso Spa Centre, the largest hotel spa on the island 💆‍♀️ → Five dining venues including Porfyra rooftop gourmet and Koi Asian fusion 🍽️ → Multiple outdoor pools plus tennis, squash, basketball and a fully equipped gym 🏊‍♀️ → Rooms and suites with options for private pools, Jacuzzi baths and sea-view balconies 🛏️ → Children's mini club and dedicated kids' pool for ages 4-12, six days a week 👨‍👩‍👧
Available for Summer 2026 and 2027 seasons, with wedding facilities, a shopping arcade and 24-hour reception on-site. Ideal for couples wanting spa-led downtime, families needing structured children's programmes, and groups celebrating a milestone.
*The largest hotel spa on Rhodes, four kilometres from Rhodes Town* 🌅
Ready to book your Rhodes escape? 🌅 Email: bookings@thejltgroup.co.uk 📩
#Rhodes #GreekIslands #LuxuryTravel #FamilyResort #TheJLTCollection

item.title: ✨ Property Spotlight: Sun Gardens Dubrovnik, Orasac 🌊
item.description:
✨ Property Spotlight: Sun Gardens Dubrovnik, Orasac 🌊
A five-star seafront resort in the Mediterranean village of Orasac, just 11km from Dubrovnik's UNESCO-listed Old Town. Sun Gardens is a Leading Hotels of the World member with six restaurants, an award-winning spa, and direct pebble-beach access to the Adriatic.
The rare Croatian resort that works equally well for families, couples, and adventurers under one roof. 🌅
✨ What makes this special: → Seafront setting overlooking the Adriatic and the Elaphiti Islands 🌊 → Award-winning spa with indoor pool, steam room, sauna and massages 💆‍♀️ → Six dining venues including Cilantro, The Market and The Butcher 🍽️ → NUKU beach bar, three pool bars and the Differo Signature Bar 🍸 → Direct pebble-beach access to the Adriatic Sea 🏖️ → Baby Club for 12 months to 3 years, plus seasonal children's facilities 👶
Set amid manicured Mediterranean gardens with 201 rooms and suites plus 207 residences, offering space for everyone from couples to multi-generational families. Eleven kilometres from Dubrovnik's Old Town and the stunning architecture that draws travellers to the Dalmatian coast.
*Six restaurants, five bars, one award-winning spa, and direct sea access… all within a Leading Hotels of the World property* 🌅
Ready to escape to the Dalmatian coast? 🌊 Email: bookings@thejltgroup.co.uk 📩
#Dubrovnik #Croatia #LuxuryTravel #LeadingHotels #TheJLTCollection

item.title: ✨ Cruise Spotlight: Windmills, Tulips & Belgian Delights, Netherlands & Belgium 🌷
item.description:
✨ Cruise Spotlight: Windmills, Tulips & Belgian Delights, Netherlands & Belgium 🌷
Eight days round-trip from Amsterdam aboard Scenic's 5-Star Space-Ship, sailing through Dutch waterways into Belgium at the peak of tulip season. Truly all-inclusive ultra-luxury with Keukenhof Gardens, Antwerp diamonds, and windmill-lined riverside scenery.
Spring on the rivers, when the bulbs are at their showiest and the ship carries just 163 guests. 🌸
✨ What makes this special: → 8-day ultra-luxury river cruise round-trip from Amsterdam 🚢 → 5-Star Scenic Space-Ship carrying up to 163 guests, with Standard Suites or Balcony Suites featuring the Sun Lounge 🛏️ → Keukenhof Gardens: 7 million flowering bulbs across almost 80 acres 🌷 → 16 included Scenic Freechoice activities, from a sustainable cheese farm to the Delta Works barrier and after-hours Fabrique des Lumières 🎨 → Visits to Antwerp (world's diamond capital), Veere, Arnhem and the baroque Palais Het Loo 💎 → 20 meals plus complimentary premium beverages all day, every day 🥂
Sails during spring departures with up to 163 guests aboard. Ideal for couples and small groups who want the scenery of a river cruise with genuine ultra-luxury service.
*20 meals, unlimited premium beverages, 16 included shore activities across 8 days* 🍽️
Ready to sail through tulip season in ultra-luxury? 🌷 Email: bookings@thejltgroup.co.uk 📩
#RiverCruise #Keukenhof #ScenicCruises #LuxuryTravel #TheJLTCollection

item.title: ✨ Property Spotlight: Villa Altavista, Nerja 🌊
item.description:
✨ Property Spotlight: Villa Altavista, Nerja 🌊
Three air-conditioned bedrooms, a private pool, and two hire cars to explore the Costa del Sol at your own pace. Villa Altavista is built for families and friends who want the freedom of their own villa without the logistics of organising flights, transfers, and a car on top.
Perfect if you've been waiting for a late-September escape that pairs space with proper sunshine. 🌅
✨ What makes this special: → Private swimming pool with sun-soaked outdoor terrace 🏊‍♀️ → Three air-conditioned bedrooms sleeping up to six guests 🛏️ → Alfresco dining area and BBQ built for slow evenings outside 🍽️ → Pool table and table tennis on-site for downtime between trips out 🎮 → Two hire cars included for the full stay, so everyone moves freely 🌍 → Return flights from Gatwick with 23kg baggage included ✈️
Sleeps up to six across three bedrooms, departing 22 September 2026. Ideal for families or two couples travelling together who want a full week of Mediterranean rhythm on a fixed all-in price.
Flights, two hire cars, and a private-pool villa in Nerja from £539 per person 🌅
Ready to escape to your own private sanctuary? 🌅 Email: bookings@thejltgroup.co.uk 📩
#Nerja #CostaDelSol #VillaHoliday #SpainGetaway #TheJLTCollection

item.title: ✨ Escape Spotlight: Arctic Explorer: Land of the Polar Bear, Svalbard 🐻‍❄️
item.description:
✨ Escape Spotlight: Arctic Explorer: Land of the Polar Bear, Svalbard 🐻‍❄️
Eleven days at the edge of the inhabited world, with seven nights aboard a 128-passenger expedition ship pushing through ice-laden fjords in search of polar bears, walruses, and whales. Travelsphere's partnership with G Adventures puts you on an Ice Class 1A vessel with the access and expertise these latitudes demand.
Perfect if you've been waiting for a polar expedition that pairs serious wildlife with proper logistics. 🧭
✨ What makes this special: → Seven nights aboard an Ice Class 1A ship across six expedition days through glacier-fed waterways 🚢 → Two off-ship Zodiac excursions daily, reaching shore landings and remote wildlife sites 🛥️ → Wildlife watching for polar bears, Arctic foxes, walruses, reindeer, seals, and whales 🐻‍❄️ → Onboard specialist lectures in ornithology, marine biology, glaciology, and polar history 💡 → Expert-to-guest ratio of 10:1 throughout the expedition 🧭 → Two nights in Oslo plus one in Longyearbyen, with guided visits to the Fram Museum, Opera House, and Akershus Castle 🏛️
Eleven days in total: two nights in Oslo, one in Longyearbyen, and seven aboard ship, with departures running July 2026 through July 2027. Built for adventure travellers and wildlife enthusiasts who want a polar expedition led by genuine specialists.
128-passenger small expedition ship, 10:1 expert-to-guest ratio, midnight sun on July departures ☀️
Ready to stand at the edge of the polar world? 🐻‍❄️ Email: bookings@thejltgroup.co.uk 📩
#Svalbard #ArcticExpedition #PolarBears #WildlifeTravel #TheJLTCollection

item.title: ✨ Escape Spotlight: Classic Japan, Japan 🇯🇵
item.description:
✨ Escape Spotlight: Classic Japan, Japan 🇯🇵
Eleven days from Kyoto's temples to Tokyo's neon, with a Shinkansen ride, a night in a working Buddhist monastery, and the slow walk between Tsumago and Matsumoto in between. Classic Japan is built for travellers who want the country's full sweep without the logistics of piecing it together solo.
A small group, an unhurried pace, and the depth that comes from staying in places most itineraries only glimpse. 🏯
✨ What makes this special: → Eleven-day small-group journey through Kyoto, Koya-san, Hiroshima, Tsumago, Matsumoto, and Tokyo 🗾 → Temple stay (Shukubo) in Koya-san and a night in a traditional ryokan 🏮 → Fourteen included activities including Kinkaku-ji Golden Pavilion, Fushimi Inari, and Hiroshima Peace Memorial Park ⛩️ → Travel by Shinkansen bullet train, local trains, and a Sumida River boat cruise in Tokyo 🚄 → Maximum twelve guests for an intimate small-group experience 👥 → Ten breakfasts and three dinners included, plus a Comfort-grade mix of ryokan, temple lodging, and hotels 🍱
Capped at twelve guests aged fifteen and up, with departures running from August 2026. Ideal for solo travellers, couples, and families with older teens who want cultural depth without sacrificing comfort.
Eleven days, six regions, one country at the pace it asks to be seen 🏯
Ready to see Japan beyond the headline cities? 🚄 Email: bookings@thejltgroup.co.uk 📩
#ClassicJapan #JapanTour #SmallGroupTravel #CulturalTravel #TheJLTCollection
